pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 language features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 syntax and semantics.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes or lack of support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version supporting Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not support the `release` flag for Java 21 or may fail to compile Java 21 code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove redundant source and target configuration in favor of the release flag.

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/Lambda.general_idea: Remove unused import of the Lombok 'val' keyword.
Replace Lombok 'val' with Java 10+ 'var' for local variable type inference.

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Remove unused import of the Lombok 'val' keyword.
Replace Lombok 'val' with standard Java 'var' to remove dependency on Lombok for local variable type inference.
